meta.summary: DIAMOND 2.2.1 for fast protein sequence search, translated DNA-to-protein search, DIAMOND database creation, and protein clustering workflows.
meta.description: DIAMOND 2.2.1 for fast protein sequence search, translated DNA-to-protein search, DIAMOND database creation, and protein clustering workflows.

test: diamond help | grep -F 'Syntax: diamond COMMAND [OPTIONS]' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'makedb' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'blastp' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'linclust' >/dev/null && { diamond blastp 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Missing parameter: database file' >/dev/null && { diamond linclust 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F -- '--cluster-steps' >/dev/null && { diamond view 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'requires a DAA' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-blastp && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-blastp && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref2
GILGYTEHQVVSSDFNSDTHSLSNISVQGDLNFVVDKDLRDTFQKLTNAK
' > ref.faa && printf '>q1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
' > query.faa && diamond makedb --in ref.faa -d ref --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-diamond-makedb.log 2>&1 && test -s ref.dmnd && diamond dbinfo -d ref.dmnd > dbinfo.txt && grep -F 'Database' dbinfo.txt >/dev/null && diamond blastp -d ref -q query.faa -o hits.tsv --threads 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 --outfmt 6 qseqid sseqid pident length evalue bitscore >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastp.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'q1' hits.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ref1' hits.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-blastx && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-blastx && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
' > ref.faa && printf '>dna1
ATGAAAACCGCTTACATTGCTAAACAAAGACAAATTTCCTTCGTGAAATCCCATTTC
' > dna.fa && diamond makedb --in ref.faa -d ref --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastx-makedb.log 2>&1 && diamond blastx -d ref -q dna.fa -o blastx.tsv --threads 1 --min-orf 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 --outfmt 6 qseqid sseqid >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastx.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'dna1' blastx.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-linclust && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-linclust && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref1_copy
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref2
GILGYTEHQVVSSDFNSDTHSLSNISVQGDLNFVVDKDLRDTFQKLTNAK
' > proteins.faa && diamond linclust -d proteins.faa -o clusters.tsv --threads 1 --approx-id 90 -M 128M >/tmp/taf-diamond-linclust.log 2>&1 && test -s clusters.tsv && grep -F 'ref1' clusters.tsv >/dev/null

upstream.name: DIAMOND
upstream.citation: Buchfink et al. 2021; Buchfink et al. 2026

meta.summary: DIAMOND 2.2.2 for fast protein sequence search, translated DNA-to-protein search, DIAMOND database creation, DAA viewing, and protein clustering workflows.

>ref1_copy
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref2
GILGYTEHQVVSSDFNSDTHSLSNISVQGDLNFVVDKDLRDTFQKLTNAK
' > proteins.faa && diamond linclust -d proteins.faa -o clusters.tsv --threads 1 --approx-id 90 -M 128M >/tmp/taf-diamond-linclust.log 2>&1 && test -s clusters.tsv && grep -F 'ref1' clusters.tsv >/dev/null

meta.summary: DIAMOND 2.2.3 for fast protein sequence search, translated DNA-to-protein search, DIAMOND database creation, DAA viewing, and protein clustering workflows.
meta.description: DIAMOND 2.2.3 for fast protein sequence search, translated DNA-to-protein search, DIAMOND database creation, DAA viewing, and protein clustering workflows.

test: diamond help | grep -F 'Syntax: diamond COMMAND [OPTIONS]' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'makedb' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'blastp' >/dev/null && diamond help | grep -F 'linclust' >/dev/null && { diamond blastp 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Missing parameter: database file' >/dev/null && { diamond linclust 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F -- '--cluster-steps' >/dev/null && { diamond linclust 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F -- '--reps' >/dev/null && { diamond view 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'requires a DAA' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-blastp && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-blastp && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref2
GILGYTEHQVVSSDFNSDTHSLSNISVQGDLNFVVDKDLRDTFQKLTNAK
' > ref.faa && printf '>q1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
' > query.faa && diamond makedb --in ref.faa -d ref --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-diamond-makedb.log 2>&1 && test -s ref.dmnd && diamond dbinfo -d ref.dmnd > dbinfo.txt && grep -F 'Database' dbinfo.txt >/dev/null && diamond blastp -d ref -q query.faa -o hits.tsv --threads 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 --outfmt 6 qseqid sseqid pident length evalue bitscore >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastp.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'q1' hits.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ref1' hits.tsv >/dev/null && diamond blastp -d ref -q query.faa -o hits-zstd.tsv.zst --compress zstd --threads 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 --outfmt 6 qseqid sseqid >/tmp/taf-diamond-zstd.log 2>&1 && test -s hits-zstd.tsv.zst && diamond blastp -d ref -q query.faa -a matches --threads 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 >/tmp/taf-diamond-daa.log 2>&1 && test -s matches.daa && diamond view -a matches.daa -o view.tsv >/tmp/taf-diamond-view.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'q1' view.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'ref1' view.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-blastx && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-blastx && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
' > ref.faa && printf '>dna1
ATGAAAACCGCTTACATTGCTAAACAAAGACAAATTTCCTTCGTGAAATCCCATTTC
' > dna.fa && diamond makedb --in ref.faa -d ref --threads 1 >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastx-makedb.log 2>&1 && diamond blastx -d ref -q dna.fa -o blastx.tsv --threads 1 --min-orf 1 --max-target-seqs 1 --evalue 100 --outfmt 6 qseqid sseqid >/tmp/taf-diamond-blastx.log 2>&1 && grep -F 'dna1' blastx.tsv >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-diamond-linclust && cd /tmp/taf-diamond-linclust && printf '>ref1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref1_copy
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQDILDLWIYHTQGYFPDWQNYTPGPGIRYPL
>ref2
GILGYTEHQVVSSDFNSDTHSLSNISVQGDLNFVVDKDLRDTFQKLTNAK
' > proteins.faa && diamond linclust -d proteins.faa -o clusters.tsv --reps reps.faa --threads 1 --approx-id 90 -M 128M >/tmp/taf-diamond-linclust.log 2>&1 && test -s clusters.tsv && test -s reps.faa && grep -F 'ref1' clusters.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F '>ref1' reps.faa >/dev/null
